failed_attempts:

  field_simp at h5 h6 h7 h8 h9 h10 h11 h12 h13 ⊢

  have ha3 : a 3 = (a 1 + a 2) / (1 - a 1 * a 2) := h₂ 1 (by norm_num)

simp only [h₀, h₁] at h3 h4 h5

  have period : ∀ n ≥ 1, a (n + 4) = 0 → a (n + 8) = 0 := by
    intro n hn hzero
    have eq1 : a (n + 6) = (a (n + 4) + a (n + 5)) / (1 - a (n + 4) * a (n + 5)) := h₂ (n + 4) (by omega)
    simp only [hzero] at eq1
    ring_nf at eq1
    have eq2 : a (n + 8) = (a (n + 6) + a (n + 7)) / (1 - a (n + 6) * a (n + 7)) := h₂ (n + 6) (by omega)
    simp only [eq1] at eq2
    ring_nf at eq2
    exact eq2
  have ha2009 : a 2009 = 0 := by
    have : 2009 = 5 + 4 * 501 := by norm_num
    have h : ∀ k, a (5 + 4 * k) = 0 := by
      intro k
      induction k with
      | zero => simp; exact ha5
      | succ k ih =>
        have : 5 + 4 * (k + 1) = (5 + 4 * k) + 4 := by ring
        rw [this]
        have h1 := period (1 + 4 * k) (by omega)
        have : 1 + 4 * k + 4 = 5 + 4 * k := by ring
        rw [this] at h1
        have : 1 + 4 * k + 8 = 5 + 4 * k + 4 := by ring
        rw [this] at h1
        exact h1 ih
    rw [this]
    exact h 501
  simp [ha2009]

simp at h1
    have h2 : a (n + 2) = (a n + a (n + 1)) / (1 - a n * a (n + 1)) := h₂ n (by omega)
    rw [h] at h2
